title: vibe-lingual config
description: Captured by `/vibe-lingual:first-run-setup` on first invocation in a target app. Records the detected framework + adapter + the soft decisions the localize loop reads (timeZone, dual-locale, locales, catalog layout). Lives at .vibe-lingual/config.json in the target app. Idempotent — re-running first-run-setup refreshes it.

framework.description: The detected i18n framework (or 'none' for a greenfield retrofit).

adapter.description: The vibe-lingual adapter that claimed this app. v1 implements next-intl only; a non-match records 'not-yet-implemented' and localize refuses to mutate.

sourceLocale.description: The source-of-truth locale catalogs are authored in (always generated first; the AVAILABLE-list fallback target). Default 'en'.

locales.description: The UI locale set. Reuses a detected language list (e.g. SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES) when present; the source locale is forced first.

messagesDir.description: Catalog directory, relative to the app root. Default 'messages'.

existingLanguageList.description: A detected app-owned language list reused for the UI picker (cowpath lesson: don't generate a parallel list).

decisions.description: The resolved values for the audit-surfaced decisions the localize loop must NOT auto-pick. Captured once the user answers them.

timezone.description: The REQUIRED timeZone decision once answered: how locale-sensitive dates resolve their zone.

dualLocale.description: Whether UI locale is modeled separately from an existing content/output locale.

htmlLang.description: Whether to update <html lang> to lang={locale}.

confidenceThresholds.description: Optional per-app overrides for the localize confidence routing. Defaults: auto-write requires an all-high file, medium stages, low is inline-only.

capturedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the first-run capture (or last refresh).
